data.id: TR-PICUS-TIER2-WMI_LATERAL_MOVEMENT: WMI Process/Service Creation for Lateral Movement
data.name: TR-PICUS-TIER2-WMI_LATERAL_MOVEMENT: WMI Invoke-WmiMethod and wmic.exe Lateral Movement
data.description: HIGH PRIORITY LATERAL MOVEMENT DETECTION: Detects WMI-based lateral movement and remote code execution observed in 11+ undetected Picus instances. Monitors for Invoke-WmiMethod cmdlet execution targeting Win32_Process, Win32_Service, and Win32_ScheduledJob for remote process creation without obvious RPC/DCOM network artifacts. Also detects wmic.exe execution with process/service creation parameters. Observable from detonation: powershell.exe running Invoke-WmiMethod, wmic.exe /node: syntax, WMI namespace access. Critical for T1047 (WMI command execution) and lateral movement without spawning obvious child processes.
data.contents: ((process.name contains 'powershell.exe' OR process.name contains 'pwsh.exe' OR process.name contains 'wmic.exe') AND (process.command_line contains 'Invoke-WmiMethod' OR process.command_line contains 'Get-WmiObject' OR process.command_line contains 'Win32_Process' OR process.command_line contains 'Win32_Service' OR process.command_line contains 'Win32_ScheduledJob' OR process.command_line contains 'Create' OR process.command_line contains '/node:' OR process.command_line contains 'class Create')) AND (process.parent.name != 'explorer.exe' AND process.parent.name != 'svchost.exe')
